_rolesComment: Discord role IDs allowed per command group.
Multiple IDs ok — user needs at least ONE.
Empty array [] = nobody can use those commands.
Get ID: Discord > Server Settings > Roles > right-click > Copy Role ID
_logComment: Channel ID where all actions are logged. Empty string to disable.
_triggersComment: Option IDs from config/options.json that trigger auto punishment history on ticket open.
